summary: Iteration 6 frontend-only smoke + acceptance test of the McLir Seaweed overhaul: GA removal, 3-language i18n, new /impressum-datenschutz page, Liquid range restricted to Cold Press 10/15 only, manufacturing timeline images, hero medallion, footer legal link, mobile responsiveness. All requested acceptance criteria are met. Zero console errors across all routes.

liquid_page.note: Test script initially flagged 'K2O' as missing — false positive: code correctly renders Unicode 'K₂O' (subscript). Verified in /app/frontend/src/data/content.js lines 68 and 126.

impressum_page.title_FR: Mentions légales et politique de confidentialité

language_translation_no_fallback.fr_nav_observed: Accueil / Produits / Pelouses & gazon / Procédé / Analyses de marché / Contact
language_translation_no_fallback.fr_impressum_title: Mentions légales et politique de confidentialité

critical_code_review_comments: i18n.jsx LANGS array correctly trimmed to [en, de, fr]; SUPPORTED set matches. detectInitialLang() still handles localStorage + navigator.languages fallback chain. Old 'ga' Gaelic entries fully removed.

App.js correctly registers /impressum-datenschutz route. Impressum.jsx renders all 10 GDPR sections + imprint block + disclaimer. Translation keys page.impressum.*, impressum.*, privacy.* are all defined for en/de/fr — verified no missing-key fallback.

Layout.jsx footer now includes a t('footer.legal') block with a single link to /impressum-datenschutz carrying data-testid='footer-link-impressum'. Mobile drawer still mounts a duplicate LanguagePicker — harmless, design choice from prior iterations.

LiquidProducts spec table uses Unicode 'K₂O' (chemical subscript) — semantically correct. Test scripts that grep for 'K2O' (ASCII) will get a false negative; recommend searching for 'K₂O' in future regression tests.
PROCESS_STEPS each carry .img URL; ManufacturingProcess.jsx renders an inside every alternating timeline card. Verified all 10 steps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified the full McLir overhaul. All acceptance criteria pass. Two pitfalls to remember for next agent: (1) the spec table uses Unicode 'K₂O' (U+2082), not ASCII 'K2O' — grep accordingly. (2) When testing the contact tiles after a language switch, use the active-language string (e.g. 'Logistique' in FR), not the EN one. The 'mobile-lang-picker' duplicate is intentional and not a defect.
